forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 assignees:
 - claude-code
 position_column: done
-position_ordinal: ffffffffffffffffffffb280
+position_ordinal: ffffffffffffffffffffffffffd480
 title: Add tests for lsp_worker indexing loop
 ---
 lsp_worker.rs

Coverage: 75.9% (85/112 lines)

Uncovered lines: 103, 127-128, 149-150, 161-163, 167-168, 178, 181, 185, 192-193, 195-196, 202, 207, 221, 228, 232, 235-237, 241, 245

Main function: `run_lsp_indexing_loop` (lines 114-213)
- Worker loop: queries dirty files, processes via index_single_file, marks indexed
- index_single_file: reads file, sends didOpen, collects/persists symbols, closes doc

Test scenarios:
- run_lsp_indexing_loop with shutdown flag set immediately → worker exits cleanly
- Worker loop with no dirty files → idles (sleep + continue)
- index_single_file with mock LSP client and real temp file → verify symbol persistence
- Poison recovery on mutex lock (line 161-163)
- Client unavailable (None) → skip path (line 167-168)

#coverage-gap #coverage-gap
\ No newline at end of file
